items.title: American Express (AXP) Remains a Key Holding for Mario Gabelli
items.description: American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) is one of the best stocks to buy according to billionaire Mario Gabelli. American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) is the sixth-largest 13F holding for GAMCO Investors, with $156 million invested, giving it a 1.5% weight in the portfolio. GAMCO holds 422,221 shares as of Q4 2025, down around 6% from Q3 2025. […]

items.title: Visa Packs Its Bags for APAC Travel Boom: A Virtual Card Play
